messages.content: You are a Threshold coach. Player says: What globals can scripts use?
Use World, Engine, Environment, State, UI, PlayerController, Physics, THREE for materials only — never scene.add or new THREE.Scene.
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: List createObject types
cube, sphere, cone, and torus — World.createObject(type, name, colorHex, usePhysics).
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: When is clearWorld OK?
Only when the user explicitly asks to wipe the scene. Default is extend-only builds.
slop scan my export

INTENT: export
API: ExportWizard + assessSceneSlop
bundle audio zones for guests

INTENT: export
API: ExportWizard immersive prefs
apply material preset wet_hero

INTENT: style
API: MaterialPresets
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: Exact World.createObject signature?
World.createObject(type, name, colorHex, usePhysics) — type first: 'cube'|'sphere'|'cone'|'torus'. Example: World.createObject('cube', 'crate', 0x8b4513, true).
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: Valid surfaceType values?
concrete, asphalt, wood, metal, gravel, grass, glass — used for footsteps and weather wetness.
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: Valid audioZone values?
interior_warm, exterior_open, industrial_hum, creek_near, highway_edge.
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: Shader hook ids?
wet_surface_boost, emissive_pulse, dust_overlay, snow_freshen, heat_shimmer — ShaderRegistry.applyHook(mesh, id).
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: Shader graph presets?
wet_hero, storm_exterior, neon_rim, wind_foliage, glass_rim — ShaderNodeGraph.applyGraph(mesh, id).
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: MaterialPresets ids?
pbr_default, pbr_concrete_weathered, pbr_asphalt_wet, pbr_wood_snow, pbr_metal_brushed, pbr_glass_wet, pbr_emissive_marquee, pbr_fabric_muted, pbr_stylized_toon.
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: When is EDIT required?
World mutations need State.isPaused true (EDIT). Scripts should early-return with UI.status if playing.
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: Default render mode?
Engine.setRenderMode(4) realistic PBR. Modes 0-3 are retro/toon/terminal only when the user asks.
open keys rebind menu

INTENT: other
API: KEYS menu + bindings
pause host to build

INTENT: edit
API: UI.togglePause
apply pbr_metal_brushed

INTENT: style
API: MaterialPresets pbr_metal_brushed
package steam build

INTENT: export
API: package:steam
run textures watch for gimp

INTENT: texture
API: textures:watch
spawn physics pyramid

INTENT: spawn
API: World.createObject
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: List HILOD commands
npm run textures:hilod builds _1k/_2k from masters; textures:watch does it on GIMP save; tex:compress makes WebP for Lite/Mobile.
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: Parallel Ollama rules?
Default sequential. Parallel is opt-in; warns above ~6 GLBs full-world; blocks above ~12 GLBs. Prefer freeze + working folder park.
You are a Threshold coach. Player says: Production plan steps?
scope → collision → mesh → textures → HILOD → weather → atmosphere → shaders → interact → codegen → verify.

Classify (two lines only — INTENT then API):
run hilod compression

INTENT: texture
API: textures:hilod + tex:compress

Classify (two lines only — INTENT then API):
switch to lite graphics

INTENT: graphics
API: graphicsProfile Lite

Classify (two lines only — INTENT then API):
write a production plan first

INTENT: other
API: production_plan
